screening_answers.recent_experience_summary: Backend & AI Engineer focused on Python, FastAPI, microservices, APIs, LLM integrations, RAG systems, and AI-powered applications.

hr_answers.tell_me_about_yourself: I am a Backend & AI Engineer with 5+ years of professional experience building scalable backend systems and AI-powered applications. My experience includes Python, FastAPI, microservices, APIs, LLM integrations, RAG systems, and open-source AI tools.
hr_answers.why_do_you_want_this_job: The role aligns well with my experience in backend engineering and AI-powered applications, and it provides an opportunity to work on impactful and scalable solutions.
hr_answers.why_should_we_hire_you: I bring a strong combination of backend engineering expertise and practical AI experience, with hands-on work building scalable systems, APIs, microservices, and LLM-based applications.
hr_answers.weakness: I sometimes spend extra time refining solutions, but I have improved my ability to balance quality with delivery timelines.
hr_answers.career_goal: To continue growing as a Backend & AI Engineer while building large-scale systems and AI-powered applications.
